label: CartService/AddItem
description: Accepts a request to add a product item to a user's shopping cart. If the product already exists in the cart, its quantity is incremented by the requested amount. If the cart does not yet exist for this user, a new cart is created.

label: CartService/GetCart
description: Retrieves the full contents of a user's shopping cart. Returns an empty cart if the user has no cart data in the store.

label: CartService/EmptyCart
description: Removes all items from a user's shopping cart. The cart key remains but its contents are cleared (Redis/in-memory) or all rows for the user are deleted (Spanner/AlloyDB).
